archimate:Facility.name: External Facility
archimate:Facility.documentation:
Definition: External Facility ABB is a Facility that enables a physical location or infrastructure that is owned or operated by a third-party organization and used by another organization or individual. These facilities may include office buildings, data centres, warehouses, manufacture
Source: ISA2-EIA
Source reference: https://ec.europa.eu/isa2/actions/towards-european-interoperability-architecture_en/
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Technical view - infrastructure
Interoperability Saliency: The External Facility ABB is saliency for organizational and technical interoperability because it establishes the business rules and responsibilities to share infrastructures for the use of public administrations. The ABB also provides the application of open specifications and solutions to make interoperable public administration solutions.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/ExternalFacilityFacility
ABB name: eira:ExternalFacilityFacility
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/ExternalFacilityFacility
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalInfrastructure

properties.value: External Facility ABB is a Facility that enables a physical location or infrastructure that is owned or operated by a third-party organization and used by another organization or individual. These facilities may include office buildings, data centres, warehouses, manufacture

The External Facility ABB is saliency for organizational and technical interoperability because it establishes the business rules and responsibilities to share infrastructures for the use of public administrations. The ABB also provides the application of open specifications and solutions to make interoperable public administration solutions.
